ddls:
CREATE TABLE "robots" (
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each robot */,
  "robot_name" TEXT /* Name of the robot */,
  "deployment_location" TEXT /* Location where the robot is deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date of deployment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the robot */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the robot */,
  "robot_status" TEXT /* Current status of the robot */,
  "robot_software_version" TEXT /* Software version installed on the robot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_robots_deployment_location FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "robot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the robot from which the data was collected */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "rlegs" INTEGER /* Right leg encoder value */,
  "llegs" INTEGER /* Left leg encoder value */,
  "dcl" INTEGER /* Distance sensor left value */,
  "dcr" INTEGER /* Distance sensor right value */,
  "gyrox" INTEGER /* Gyroscope X-axis value */,
  "gyroy" INTEGER /* Gyroscope Y-axis value */,
  "gyroz" INTEGER /* Gyroscope Z-axis value */,
  "gyrozavg" INTEGER /* Average Gyroscope Z-axis value */,
  "accelx" INTEGER /* Accelerometer X-axis value */,
  "accely" INTEGER /* Accelerometer Y-axis value */,
  "accelz" INTEGER /* Accelerometer Z-axis value */,
  "lbemf" INTEGER /* Left motor encoder value */,
  "rbemf" INTEGER /* Right motor encoder value */,
  "steerout" INTEGER /* Steering output value */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor type */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_robot_id FOREIGN KEY ("robot_id") REFERENCES robots ("robot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Additional comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)
column_names: Location where the robot is deployed
Software version installed on the robot
Unique identifier for each data entry
ID of the robot from which the data was collected
Unique identifier for each sensor type
Unit of measurement for the sensor type
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the data entry being accessed
ID of the user accessing the data
Date when the data was accessed
IP address from which the data was accessed
Device used to access the data
Unique identifier for each data version
